author: RamSet
releaseNotes: 0.10.0 - Comfort profiles over local HAP: Set Comfort Profile (Home/Away/Sleep) with a comfortProfile attribute showing the active one, plus humidifier target (Set Humidity Setpoint), fan min-on-time, and a generic Set Characteristic command — all cloud-free. Builds on 0.9.0: controls an ecobee 100% locally over the HomeKit Accessory Protocol (HAP), no cloud/Apple hardware/bridge; HomeKit event push by default (instant updates, keepalive + auto-reconnect); in-driver pairing with automatic port discovery; remote room sensors as child devices.
tags: Thermostat, ecobee, HomeKit, HAP, Local, Sensor

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Thermostat
drivers.description: Local controller for an ecobee thermostat over the HomeKit Accessory Protocol (HAP): mode, setpoints, temperature, humidity, operating state, and fan.

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Remote Sensor
drivers.description: Child device for ecobee remote sensors (temperature, occupancy, motion, battery). Created automatically by the thermostat driver.
